block_01: According to the information received from the Spanish financial regulator CNMV, their legal framework prohibits companies from involving affiliates in the promotion of financial services to the residents of Spain. Regrettably, this means that we will no longer be able to accept traffic from Spain.
block_02: As an alternative to Spanish traffic, we suggest you funnel your affiliate effort to other geos from our recommended countries' list.
block_04: On January 25, 2021, we will start redirecting Spanish affiliate traffic to the backlink — you can
block_06: . As for the clients from Spain attracted before the changes go into effect, we will keep paying for them as we normally would.
block_07: Please, make sure to apply the necessary changes to your ad campaigns and reviews before long. Rewrite the reviews targeting the Spanish audience to adjust them for new geos and visit our Promo section for fresh landing pages and banners.
